phases.name: Phase A: Emission optimization + cache fixes
phases.description: F5c butterfly Stmt.call closes loop overhead gap. CacheConfig fix + level-aware model improve plan accuracy. Benchmark Rust vs Plonky3.

study.notes: NTTPlanSelection.lean:39 l1DataSize:=32768→131072, :41 elementSize:=4→8 for Goldilocks, :43 l2MissCycles:=12→16. Apple M-series: 128KB L1D, 16cy L2. Affects plan accuracy for N≥2^14.

nodes.name: A.4: Cache model level-aware with data-reuse

study.notes: planCacheCost (NTTPlanSelection:67-71): change stageIdx-based to level-aware. R4 stage covers 2 levels in 1 pass → second level data-reuse (free). Verified: R4 saves 31.6% cache vs R2 at N=2^20. Changes bowersAdjustment automatically (L75-78). Smoke tests N=1024 unaffected (cache=0).

nodes.name: A.1: F5c butterfly Stmt.call + loop uint64_t

study.notes: goldi_butterfly preamble C+Rust (~30 LOC). lowerStageVerified_GoldiCall (~40 LOC): if k>32 && boundK>0 && boundK≤2 → Stmt.call void 'goldi_butterfly' with addrOf for data/twiddles + uint64_t indices. Loop counters group/pair change to uint64_t (the F5 attempt 3 bug disappears because butterfly body is 1 Stmt.call, no __uint128_t mixing). Precedent: neonCallVoid SIMDStmtToC:104-127.

nodes.name: A.5: Benchmark Rust vs Plonky3 Rust

study.notes: Rust preamble already exists for goldi_reduce128/add/sub (VerifiedPlanCodeGen:716-728). Run benchmark.py --fields goldilocks --hardware arm-scalar --langs rust --sizes 14,20. Fair comparison: same compiler (rustc→LLVM), same patterns (overflowing_sub/add). Expected gap <1.10x.

phases.name: Phase B: Discovery wiring via selectBestPlanExplored
phases.description: Connect existing Discovery pipeline to plan competition. selectBestPlanExplored already does oracle→explore→Plan with theorems for 3 fields. Just push as candidate.

study.notes: Import MatPlanExtraction + open selectBestPlanExplored. Call if n≤jointThreshold, push to allCandidates before selectPlanWith. Raise jointThreshold to 16384. Gate double exploration: if exploredPlan active, jointOptimize still runs for report only. Add report line if Discovery won. ~14 LOC. NO reordering needed (Approach 1).

blocks.name: Discovery wiring
blocks.gate: lake build + report shows Discovery plan participated + BabyBear no regression

phases.name: Phase C: NTT trick runtime branch
phases.description: Exploit Goldilocks omega_64=8: twiddles that are powers-of-2 use shift instead of multiply. Runtime popcnt branch in goldi_butterfly.

nodes.name: C.1: NTT trick runtime popcnt branch

study.notes: In goldi_butterfly preamble: if(__builtin_popcountll(w)==1) → wb = goldi_reduce128((__uint128_t)b << __builtin_ctzll(w)) instead of w*b. Verified: omega_64=8, stages 0-4 are 100% power-of-2 twiddles, stage 5 is 69% pow2 + 31% not-pow2. Branch predictor handles well (consistent per-stage). ~30 LOC in C+Rust preamble. Impact: ~5% with CT standard, ~12-20% with NTT trick decomposition (v3.13.0).

blocks.name: NTT trick
blocks.gate: validation PASS + benchmark shows ≥3% improvement for Goldilocks

phases.name: Phase D: Lazy reduction REAL + prefetch
phases.description: Fix lazy's 3-layer fiction: safety gate u128, cost model lazy=0, codegen skip reduction. Add software prefetch for early stages.

study.notes: BoundPropagation.lean:160-161: def lazyReductionSafe (currentK p : Nat) (wordBits : Nat := 64). For Goldilocks (wideType=__uint128_t): pass wordBits:=128. For BabyBear: default 64 (no change). 14 callers across 8 files — most use default, only Goldilocks paths need explicit 128.

nodes.name: D.2+D.3: Cost model lazy=0 + codegen skip reduction

study.notes: 3 changes TOGETHER (never partial): 1) CrossRelNTT:94 reductionCostForHW .lazy→0 (not Solinas cost). 2) CrossRelNTT:60-79 costAwareReductionForBound: add .lazy to candidates when lazyReductionSafe. 3) VerifiedPlanCodeGen:103-106 lowerReductionChoice .lazy→passthrough (Stmt.assign passVar xExpr, no Solinas fold). BREAKS lazy_eq_solinas_cost:=rfl (NTTPlan:305) — delete it (0 callers, smoke test only).

buildBoundAwareStages (NTTPlan:133) + buildStagesFromAssignment (MatPlanExtraction:49) + optimizeNTTWithBounds (BoundIntegration:223): add wordBits param, pass 128 when p > 2^32. mkBoundAwarePlan passes wordBits:= if p > 2^32 then 128 else 64. ~10 LOC across 3 files.

lowerReductionChoice_sound needs new .lazy case: assign passVar xExpr preserves value (trivial: x=x). Delete lazy_eq_solinas_cost (NTTPlan:305, 0 callers). computeStageBounds smoke tests (BoundPropagation:394) may need update. ~20 LOC.

nodes.name: D.6: Software prefetch for early stages

study.notes: String emission in emitCFromPlanVerified: __builtin_prefetch(&data[i+dist],0,3) for stages where stride*elemSize > l1DataSize. ~15 LOC. Flag prefetch:Bool in NTTStage (default false, set true for early stages by plan generation). Rust: core::arch::aarch64::_prefetch. Impact: ~3-8% for N≥2^16.

blocks.name: Lazy + Prefetch
blocks.gate: mkBoundAwarePlan produces lazyStages>0 + validation PASS + no sorry added

performance: Discovery plan participates in selectPlanWith (report shows)
quality: No field-specific if-statements in cache model

properties.description: F5c output numerically identical to non-F5c for same input
Discovery plan competes in selectPlanWith with full cost model
